name: Rentabilidade de Aluguel
description: Calcule a rentabilidade bruta anual de um imóvel alugado.
seo_title: Rentabilidade de Aluguel – Rápido e Preciso
seo_description: Calcule a rentabilidade bruta anual de um imóvel alugado. Calculadora gratuita, precisa e instantânea Usado por profissionais e estudantes em todo o.
example_label: Calculating gross rental yield for property worth $320,000 generating $18,000 annual rent.
result_context: The yield_pct of {yield_pct}% is the gross rental yield before expenses and vacancies.
mistakes: Using gross yield without accounting for expenses (taxes, maintenance, vacancies)
Not including purchase costs in total investment calculation
Comparing yields across markets without considering appreciation potential
